settings.heading: Shipping
settings.intro: We pack carefully and dispatch from the UK. Live stock means what you order is what leaves the bench.
settings.uk_body:
Orders placed before 2pm on a working day are usually dispatched the same day where possible, otherwise the next working day.

Standard UK tracked delivery is available at checkout. Orders of £40 or more qualify for free UK delivery.

Singles and sealed are packed to protect corners and condition in transit.
settings.rates_body:
• UK tracked — calculated at checkout
  • Free UK delivery — orders £40+
  • International — available where offered at checkout; duties/taxes may apply on arrival

Final shipping options and prices are shown before you pay.
settings.timing_body:
You’ll get a confirmation email when your order is placed, then another when it ships with tracking where available.

Weekends and bank holidays can add a day. If tracking stalls or something looks off, email support@koricollectibles.co.uk and we’ll sort it.
settings.notes_body:
• We only list live inventory — no ghost stock.
  • Cards are condition-checked before packing.
  • If an item is damaged in transit, contact us with photos within 48 hours of delivery.
